content:
Member-only story

7 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

I started building apps in June 2025, almost a year ago.
Back then I was making only $50/mo. Over time, I have experimented a lot and grew my apps portfolio.
I am a solo-developer: I build games, apps and create content around developing them.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

RevenueCat Analytics DashboardLast month, I made ~$1,100/mo from my mobile apps. Some stats:

• 90% organic revenue

• 100% built with AI

• ~100 downloads/day across IOS & Android

• Almost equal split between both for revenue

• 70% of the revenue comes from 20% of the apps

• Built 40+ apps, only kept ~20 live
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Some of my appsThe best part is you just build once and publish it. You don’t need to spend a lot of time managing it or constantly adding new features.
Occasional customer support is needed but again I use AI to solve those, for example this customer faced an issue…
